hooks.command: node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')).tool_input.file_path||''; const b=p.replace(/\\\\/g,'/').split('/').pop(); const blocked=/^\\.env(\\..*)?$|\\.encryption_key$|\\.db$|trading_journal\\.db$/.test(b); if(blocked){console.error('Blocked edit to sensitive file: '+b+'. Edit .env.example instead, or use a migration for DB schema.');process.exit(2);}"

node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')).tool_input.command||''; if(/\\bgit\\s+commit.*--no-verify|--no-gpg-sign/.test(c)){console.error('Blocked: --no-verify / --no-gpg-sign not allowed. Fix the hook failure instead.');process.exit(2);}"

node -e "const p=(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')).tool_input.file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); const isFE=/\\/frontend\\/src\\/.*\\.(tsx?|jsx?)$/.test(p); if(!isFE)process.exit(0); const cp=require('child_process'); try{cp.execSync('cd frontend && npx --no-install eslint --fix \"'+p.split('frontend/')[1]+'\" && npx --no-install prettier --write \"'+p.split('frontend/')[1]+'\"',{stdio:'inherit'});}catch(e){process.exit(0);}"

node -e "const p=(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')).tool_input.file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); const isPy=/\\/(backend|tj-connector)\\/.*\\.py$/.test(p); if(!isPy)process.exit(0); const cp=require('child_process'); try{cp.execSync('python -m ruff format \"'+p+'\" && python -m ruff check --fix \"'+p+'\"',{stdio:'inherit'});}catch(e){process.exit(0);}"

node -e "const p=(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')).tool_input.file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); const isIBKR=/(tj-connector\\/.*\\.py|backend\\/ibkr_.*\\.py|backend\\/routers\\/(sync|portfolio|strike_calculator)\\.py)$/.test(p); if(!isIBKR)process.exit(0); const fs=require('fs'); try{const src=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); const writeApis=['placeOrder','cancelOrder','modifyOrder','reqGlobalCancel','exerciseOptions','transferPosition']; const hits=writeApis.filter(a=>new RegExp('\\\\b'+a+'\\\\b').test(src)); if(hits.length){console.error('\\n[IBKR SAFETY] WRITE-API detected in '+p+': '+hits.join(', ')+'. Connector must remain read-only. Remove or justify in PR.');}}catch(e){}"
